ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spark_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Spark configuration */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Spark version */,
  "broadcast_blockSize" INTEGER /* Broadcast block size */,
  "broadcast_checksum" INTEGER /* Broadcast checksum */,
  "broadcast_compress" INTEGER /* Broadcast compress */,
  "default_parallelism" INTEGER /* Default parallelism */,
  "executor_cores" INTEGER /* Number of executor cores */,
  "executor_instances" INTEGER /* Number of executor instances */,
  "executor_memory" TEXT /* Executor memory */,
  "executor_memoryOverhead" INTEGER /* Executor memory overhead */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the configuration is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spark_configurations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES spark_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spark_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Spark version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the Spark version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the Spark version */,
  "end_of_life" TEXT /* End-of-life date for the Spark version */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the official documentation of the Spark version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Spark application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the Spark application */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Type of the Spark application (e.g., data processing, machine learning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runtime_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runtime metric */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Spark configuration */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the Spark application */,
  "memory_fraction" REAL /* Memory fraction */,
  "memory_offHeap_enabled" INTEGER /* Memory off-heap enabled */,
  "memory_offHeap_size" TEXT /* Memory off-heap size */,
  "memory_storageFraction" REAL /* Memory storage fraction */,
  "rdd_compress" INTEGER /* RDD compress */,
  "reducer_maxBlocksInFlightPerAddress" INTEGER /* Reducer max blocks in flight per address */,
  "reducer_maxReqsInFlight" INTEGER /* Reducer max requests in flight */,
  "reducer_maxSizeInFlight" TEXT /* Reducer max size in flight */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  "node_count" INTEGER /* Number of nodes used in the Spark application */,
  "task_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tasks executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runtime_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES spark_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_applications" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Spark configuration */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Spark application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data scientist, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
